rulings.Case Title: ROSA ANN ROBINSON VS. JEFFERY WINDHAM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT JEFFERY WINDHAM's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to meet his burden on a motion to vacate default and/or default judgment. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Liverpool Lils And Gilbert Hodges Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlemen
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC., and GILBERT "GIL" HODGES Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement continued to December 7, 2017. Parties are ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings no later than December 5, 2017 by 9:30 a.m. with cover letters reflecting the new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copy of the reply. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: FRANKLIN ESCOBAR VS. GINA HUGHES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoena For Employment Records To Maynard Rich Management Company
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN ESCOBAR's Motion To Quash Subpoena For Employment Records To Maynard Rich Management Company transferred to department to 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on December 19, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 301 no later than December 4, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: DUANE L. FRISBIE VS. JOHN VOTRUBA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs JOHN VOTRUBA and TERESA VOTRUBA's Petition To Compel Arbitration GRANTED. Defendant only moved to compel arbitration foregoing mediation, i.e. no attorney's fees will be available to Defendant shall defendant prevail. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NEW CALIFORNIA LAND COMPANY VS. SAL GLYNN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Relief From Forefeiture Due To Hardship
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT SAL GLYNN's Motion For Relief From Forefeiture Due To Hardship Hearing Required. Plaintiff's objections are overruled. Motion is timely per CCP 1179. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL J. TURON VS. JENNIFER RODRIGUE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 7. ASSIGNEE COLLECTRIX LLC's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption Hearing Required. Defendant to provide to the Court no later than 9:00 a.m. on December 5, 2017: (1) rental agreement and/or rent payment receipt for October and November 2017; and/or declaration from the current landlord to whom $400/month is paid; (2) utilities and telephone bills for October 2017; (3) paid medical bills and invoices for September, October and November 2017; (4) credit card bill (redacted, only the amount due and balance showing) for October and November 2017; (5) any evidence of food, transportation and laundry expenses. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: BANNEKER HOMES, INC. VS. MONIQUE ELAMIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT MONIQUE EL AMIN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint (and attachments thereto) sufficiently state facts regarding termination live-in aid's possession of the premises upon the demise of the tenant who requested authorization for a live-in aid. = (501/LOT)
